L2.Rockets_form: W4シード確定。VanVleet OUT(ACL)。Sengun ACTIVE(B008確認済)。W3争い可能性あり（Nuggets NRtg 5.1 vs Rockets 5.0）→ モチベーション高

L4.lineup_risk: Rockets: Sengunをはじめ主力出場予定。W3シード争いが動機（Nuggets/Rockets差が僅差）

analysis.b008_required: 当日11am-1pm EST のNBA公式傷病リストでRockets主力（Sengun等）ACTIVE最終確認要

games.verdict_note: B008最終確認（当日11am EST）でRockets主力ACTIVE確認後GO。Grizzlies 8選手activeという稀有状況がL1差を押し上げており、オッズ-500(1.20)でEV+5.6%は閾値クリア。
games.opponent_odds_note: GEN008: opponent (MEM) odds not retrievable from WebSearch. Marked null.

verification.facts: HOU 132-101 MEM (2026-04-12). Rockets rested Sengun, KD, Amen Thompson, Jabari Smith Jr (W5 seed already locked). Tari Eason 20pts/8ast, Reed Sheppard 19pts led. Sources: nba.com gamenotes/rockets, espn gameId 401811049, statsdmz.nba.com/pdfs/20260412/20260412_MEMHOU_book.pdf.

analysis.decisive_factor: L1 — NRtg diff 10.6pt held even with HOU starter rest; MEM 8-player skeleton lineup overwhelmed by HOU bench depth (Eason+Sheppard combined 39pts).
analysis.market_blind_spot: Pre-game prediction_basis assumed Sengun ACTIVE (B008 ACTIVE check). Actual lineup had 4 starters out. Outcome was 'right answer for different reason' — bench-depth gap, not star-power gap.

rules_implication.candidate_pattern: Roster-quality gap dominates even when fav rests stars (NBA bench depth vs g-league-quality skeleton lineup)

games.outcome_note: GO HIT +0.20u. ただし prediction_basis (Sengun ACTIVE) は外れ、Sengun/KD/Thompson/Smith Jr 全員 OUT。bench depth (Eason 20/8 + Sheppard 19) が +31 margin を生んだ。hit_unexpected 付与。

L2.Cavaliers_form: E4シード確定。Mitchell DTD（4/11 Hawks戦休養）→ 4/12復帰目標（最後の正規シーズン出場機会）。Allen DTD（膝管理・直近Grizzlies戦に復帰記録あり）

L4.mitchell_status: DTD。4/12が正規シーズン最後の試合 → 復帰動機あり。ただし確定まで判断保留
L4.odds_concern: 過去同カード(2月)でCavaliers -1600相当の極端なオッズ。現在のオッズが取得できていない。-700〜-1000なら EV = (0.91×1.1〜1.143)-1 = +0.1〜+3.8% → 閾値未達

analysis.b008_required: 当日11am-1pm ESTのNBA公式傷病リストでMitchell/Allen出場可否確認要

games.match: Los Angeles Lakers vs Houston Rockets
games.prediction_basis: NRtg diff 3.5pt (HOU 5.0 vs LAL 1.5). L1 SKIP (< 5pt threshold). Rockets higher NRtg AND market favorite.
games.date_correction: ET 4/18 Sat (records 記載 4/19 を修正)。Crypto.com Arena LA。
games.miss_analysis: **LAL 107-98 HOU UPSET (A029新規登録候補)**。L4要因が絶対的: Kevin Durant (HOU) G1 欠場 (right knee contusion/patellar tendon deep bruise, 火曜日の練習で負傷, ESPN/CBS/Yahoo複数確認)。Durant RS 26.0ppg の絶対主力欠場で HOU は "shell of itself" (CBS)。LAL は short-handed でも Luke Kennard playoff career-high 27pts 爆発。L1 NRtg 3.5pt 差は HOU の Durant 前提値、Durant 欠場で NRtg 実質 -3〜-4pt 下方修正すべきだった。pre-game warmup で ruled out 確認情報は game-day dailyfaceoff 相当の NBA injury report で取得可能だった。
games.outcome_note: KD G1 absence決定的。Udoka "nothing major", G2 game-time decision。ルール化候補: NBA PO G1 star scorer (>25ppg RS) 欠場時の -8〜-10% 補正。
games.rule_linked: PENDING (NBA RS 4/19 LAL-HOU - PO seeding 直前 motivation 確認要 - Session_52 詳細補填)

games.prediction_basis: NRtg diff 8.5pt (BOS 8.1 vs PHI -0.4). L1 PASS (>5pt). Embiid OUT appendicitis. High confidence but odds @1.13 too short: EV = (0.87 * 1.13) - 1 = -1.7%. SKIP.
games.skip_reason: EV negative despite high confidence. Celtics too heavily favored at 1.13.
games.outcome_note: BOS 123-91 PHI G1 HIT (predicted Boston, conf 87%). SKIP no-bet (EV -1.7% @1.13). +32 margin franchise PO opener record。Embiid OUT (appendectomy) で PHI 戦力低下も Q3_output_a 高信頼予測通り。市場 odds (1.13) と一致 → market_divergence 付与せず (boundary_rules Q3_output_a_hit ガイドライン準拠)。

miss_analysis.summary: G1 で BOS 123-91 PHI blowout HIT 後、G2 PHI @home away で +14pt UPSET。PHI 3P 19/39 (48.7%) vs G1 の 4本のみから劇的改善。Edgecombe 30pts+10reb (fall怪我プレイ継続) / Maxey 29pts が BOS backcourt を圧倒。BOS 3P 13/47 (27.7%) + FG 39.3% + turnover 13 で PHI に16得点献上。Jaylen Brown 36pts も焼け石。Embiid 欠場継続 (appendectomy 4/9) の中での PHI 勝利で BOS 油断要因強い。
miss_factors: PHI 3P explosion (19/39 vs G1 4本) - shooting variance
G1 blowout win後の home favorite mental 緩み

games.note: G1 SAS HIT (Wemby 35pts). NRtg+8.40pt. conf85/mkt84.7/EV≈0. Q3 output_a.
games.result: Portland Trail Blazers 106-103 San Antonio Spurs

miss_analysis.summary: SAS G2 MISS (POR 106-103 SAS) - **Wembanyama 2Q で脳震盪退場 (Holiday ファウルで face-first fall, jaw slam)** が決定要因。Wemby NBA concussion protocol 入り。SAS は Wemby なしで 4Q 序盤 14pt リードを築いたが、最後 3:37 無得点で POR に 11-2 run で逆転負け。Scoot Henderson 31pts (11/15 FG / 5/9 3P) で POR breakout。Castle 18pts/8reb / Vassell 16/12 も star scorer 不在を埋められず。**A029 (KD 欠場 LAL-HOU G1 MISS) と同じ star scorer absence パターン** - P024 decisive evidence 2件目。
miss_factors: Wembanyama 2Q concussion退場 (face-first fall fouled by Holiday)
L1 NRtg は Wemby ON baseline → star OFF で proxy 破綻 (A029/P024 pattern)
Scoot Henderson 31pts POR breakout (若手 breakout pattern P022)
miss_analysis.rule_pipeline_evidence: P024 (star scorer >25ppg absence) evidence 2/3 到達 (A029 KD HOU + this)

games.note: G1 LAL upset(A029 KD OUT). KD G2 game-time decision (patellar contusion). SKIP KD-dependent.
games.miss_analysis: G1 KD 欠場で LAL に series リード奪われた状況で G2 KD 復帰したが LAL momentum + Doncic-LeBron tier scoring で 101-94 連敗。KD 復帰後の game 1 conditioning + chemistry 不足が responseable。HOU バックコート rotation 不安定 (Sengun foul trouble)。L4 momentum carryover が L1 NRtg signal を上回った。star return G2 でも momentum 反転は容易ではない (P024 補強示唆)。
games.rule_linked: P024 candidate subset (star return G2 momentum failure)

games.miss_analysis: Wemby concussion OUT L4 -8 to -10% adjustment justified POR pick, but SAS rookie Dylan Harper (No.2 pick) 27pts career night exceeded the L4 buffer. star scorer absence offset by bench breakout = P024 simple -8/-10% adjustment limit exposed. depth/draft pedigree factor needed.
games.rule_linked_candidate: P024 counter-evidence: simple star OFF -10% adjustment insufficient, replacement quality factor required
games.rule_linked_note: P024 (NBA PO star scorer absence -8〜-10% 補正) limit exposed evidence: Wemby OUT で POR 予測したが SAS rookie Dylan Harper 27pts career-high で bench breakout が L4 buffer を超えた。'star scorer absence + opponent bench breakout' compound case として P024 拡張提案 (depth/draft pedigree factor 追加)

games.miss_analysis: TOR 93-89 CLE G4 = scope外UPSET (CLE 市場fav 1.59 敗戦 / 4点差 NBA 1桁差) [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869377]。Q4 で TOR 33-31 (2点差勝ち) で逆転 [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869377]。TOR FT% 75% (27/36) vs CLE 65% (15/23) で FT execution 優位 [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869377]。TOR turnover 12 vs CLE 18 で ball security 優位 [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869377]。Barnes go-ahead FT in final minute + 23pts / Ingram 23pts [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869377]。CLE Mitchell 20pts (6/24 FG = 25% FG / 4/4 FT) で primary scorer の FG 不振 [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869377]。CLE 全体 FG 37% (32/87) / 3P 25% (10/40) でシュート不振 [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869377]。→ NRtg 1.5pt diff の market 1.59 implied 63% は home elimination pressure + Q4 clutch FT execution + TOR ball security のリスクを過小評価していた可能性 [INFER]。→ TOR home elimination motivation で defensive intensity が CLE の FG efficiency を 37% まで抑え込んだ可能性 [INFER]。→ G3 で TOR home 126-104 で大敗していたチームの bounce-back 性質も Q4 clutch 逆転を後押し [INFER]。
games.rule_linked_note: P028 (NBA G2/G3 home fav 4Q execution collapse) との弱紐付け: 本 case は G4 road fav (CLE) の Q4 execution collapse / TOR home Q4 33-31 逆転で類似構造。柱A 議題1 確定方針遵守: 同一 turn 内での新規 P*** 候補化を保留 (案Q 暫定対応 / P028 evidence の正式カウント対象とはしない)。 候補パターン: 'NBA PO road fav 2-1 series リードが home dog Q4 ball security/FT execution で 1桁差 (≤9点差) 逆転 UPSET'. 本 case (TOR 93-89 CLE / 4点差) は本パターンの 1件目 evidence 候補 (candidate_pattern=nba_po_road_fav_series_lead_home_dog_close_game_upset / registry 登録済). 議題1 確定方針 (異セッション独立 evidence 3件) 遵守 [MEMORY:CLAUDE.md 柱A 議題1 確定方針].
games.potential_new_p_candidate_note: 保留候補 (議題1 確定方針による次セッション以降の独立 evidence 蓄積待ち): 'NBA PO road fav 2-1 series リードが home dog Q4 ball security/FT execution で 1桁差 (≤9点差) 逆転 UPSET' パターン。本 G4 (TOR 93-89 CLE) は本パターンの 1件目 evidence 候補。次セッション以降に異セッション独立 evidence 2件追加で current_count 3/3 到達なら柱A 承認制プロセス起動。

games.match_summary: HOU 115-96 LAL G4 [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869405]。HOU 市場fav 1.53 (implied 65%) 通りに勝利、predicted_winner=HOU 一致 = HIT [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869405]。Amen Thompson 23pts (10/16 FG = 62.5%) + Tari Eason 20pts で HOU 若手 scoring carry [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869405]。HOU Q3 34pts vs LAL 18pts (差 16pts) でハーフタイム後の third quarter dominance が試合決定 [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869405]。HOU 3P% 40% (12/30) vs LAL 3P% 23% (5/22) で perimeter shooting 圧倒 [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869405]。LAL turnover 24 vs HOU 13 で ball security 致命的に劣勢 [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869405]。LAL Ayton 19pts (9/12 FG) のみ目立った貢献、LeBron/Doncic/Davis ともゲームリーダー外 (top scorer 報道に未掲載) [FETCH:https://www.espn.com/nba/game/_/gameId/401869405]。→ HOU 0-3 elimination back-to-wall motivation + Q3 third quarter explosion + 3P variance positive swing で 19点差 blowout を実現 [INFER]。→ LAL は 3-0 リードからの油断 (complacency) + road game での energy depletion で turnover 多発 [INFER]。→ 既存 P028_candidate (G1 home fav win 後 G2 home 4Q execution collapse) とは方向違いだが LAL 側の Q3 execution collapse 要素は構造的類似 [INFER]。
